query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(720001, 'What does Galatians passionately defend?', 'multiple_choice', '["Justification by faith alone", "Circumcision for Gentiles", "The Mosaic Law", "Temple worship"]', 'Justification by faith alone', 1),
(720001, 'According to Galatians 2:20, what has happened to the believer?', 'multiple_choice', '["Crucified with Christ", "Baptized into Moses", "Circumcised in heart", "Freed from all suffering"]', 'Crucified with Christ', 2),
(720001, 'Which letters are called the Prison Epistles?', 'multiple_choice', '["Ephesians, Philippians, Colossians, Philemon", "Romans, Galatians, Ephesians, Colossians", "1-2 Timothy, Titus, Philemon", "1-2 Corinthians, Galatians, Romans"]', 'Ephesians, Philippians, Colossians, Philemon', 3),
(720001, 'What does Ephesians emphasize about the church?', 'multiple_choice', '["The church as Christ''s body", "The church as Israel''s replacement", "The church as a political entity", "The church as a social club"]', 'The church as Christ''s body', 4),
(720001, 'What theme dominates the book of Philippians?', 'multiple_choice', '["Joy", "Suffering", "Judgment", "Law"]', 'Joy', 5),
(720001, 'What does Philippians 2:5-11 describe?', 'multiple_choice', '["Christ''s humility and exaltation", "The armor of God", "The fruit of the Spirit", "The gifts of the Spirit"]', 'Christ''s humility and exaltation', 6),
(720001, 'What false teaching does Colossians combat?', 'multiple_choice', '["Teaching that diminished Christ''s supremacy", "Teaching that promoted circumcision", "Teaching that denied the resurrection", "Teaching that rejected Paul''s authority"]', 'Teaching that diminished Christ''s supremacy', 7),
(720001, 'Who was Onesimus in the letter to Philemon?', 'multiple_choice', '["A runaway slave converted through Paul", "A church leader in Colossae", "Paul''s traveling companion", "A false teacher"]', 'A runaway slave converted through Paul', 8),
(720001, 'Which letters are called the Pastoral Epistles?', 'multiple_choice', '["1-2 Timothy and Titus", "Ephesians, Philippians, Colossians", "Romans and Galatians", "Hebrews and James"]', '1-2 Timothy and Titus', 9),
(720001, 'What is 2 Timothy known as?', 'multiple_choice', '["Paul''s final letter", "Paul''s first letter", "Paul''s longest letter", "Paul''s most theological letter"]', 'Paul''s final letter', 10),
(720001, 'Explain the significance of the Christological hymn in Philippians 2:5-11 for understanding Jesus'' nature and work.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'The hymn presents Christ''s voluntary humiliation from divine glory to human servant and death, followed by God''s exaltation of Him as Lord over all.', 11);
command:
